CRANK_DEP_001 — dependency direction violation.

A `:domain` boundary module references an `:infrastructure` boundary
module (or a third-party impure app). Boundary catches it; the `:crank`
Mix compiler reformats the diagnostic with this code.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/boundary_integration_test.exs — translate_error/2 for
  invalid_reference tuples whose target is in :third_party_impure.
- test/integration/topology_test.exs — end-to-end: a domain module
  referring to an infrastructure module fails compile.
